raw_title: Political Communication Special Issue Introduction: Multi-Platform Research
title_en: Political Communication Special Issue Introduction: Multi-Platform Research
title_zh: 政治传播特刊导言：多平台研究
plain_summary_zh: 本文是《政治传播》期刊特刊的导言，介绍了多平台研究这一主题，探讨了在多个媒体平台上进行政治传播研究的重要性。
plain_summary_en: This is the introduction to a special issue of the journal Political Communication, focusing on multi-platform research and its significance in studying political communication across various media platforms.
research_direction_zh: 政治传播中的多平台研究方法与理论
research_direction_en: Multi-platform research methods and theories in political communication
